caption: A man with short dark hair, wearing a dark shirt, appears in a small video inset in the upper right corner of a screen recording. The main part of the screen displays a presentation titled "Rural Community Food System" with a section header labeled "Introduction." Below this, the text asks, "What constitutes a sustainable localized food system for a rural community source as local as possible from locally owned and operated to benefit the community." A section for "Session Videos" lists various dates, and a paragraph explains how to contribute by "adding community" or "mapping a number to evolve the map." The text mentions a "Collaborative Directory" and a "Crit Notes" section. To the right of the text is a complex circular diagram with green lines and nodes. Across the sequence of frames, the man in the inset remains relatively still, and the screen content does not change, maintaining a static view of the presentation slides.
